page_title: Transit visa: Who needs a transit visa - Canada.ca

h2: Make sure you need a transit visa

sections.heading: Make sure you need a transit visa
items: Before you apply, find out which entry document you need to transit through Canada.
This could be a visa or an Electronic Travel Authorization (eTA).
The entry document you need depends on:
bullets: the type of travel document you plan to travel with
the country that issued your travel document
your method of travel to Canada for this trip
